Definition: The property appears materially less operationally demanding than a typical asset. Management effort is expected to be light across most or all categories.
The property carries below-normal operating intensity. Some management work is still expected, but the overall burden is lighter than a standard baseline property.
The property falls within a typical operating range. The expected management workload is consistent with ordinary tenant, turnover, maintenance, and compliance demands.
The property is expected to require above-normal management attention. One or more categories are likely creating additional operating pressure.
The property is expected to require sustained management involvement, with multiple categories contributing to higher workload, coordination, or risk.
The property appears operationally intensive. Significant management attention is expected across several categories, and the result should be handled carefully by the downstream pricing workflow.
